summary: Launch PoligonSoft, open the Master module, and load the prepared MED file to start the simulation workflow.
actions: Download the geometry file 3dMesh_Sym.med. It is a 3D mesh created in SALOME.
Double-click the PoligonSoft icon on the desktop.
In the main PoligonSoft window, click Master.
Сlick the Load Geometry File button.
Define the units of measurement for the model, in this case millimeters, and click OK.
In the Open Geometry window, click No to load the default simulation parameters.
expected: The model will appear visible in the workspace and will be ready for the next stage of simulation setup.
